questions.text: The frequency of AC supply in India is:
questions.explanation: In India, the standard AC supply frequency is 50 Hz. In USA, it is 60 Hz.

questions.text: For a pure resistor in AC circuit, voltage and current are in phase.
questions.explanation: In a pure resistive AC circuit, voltage and current reach their maximum and minimum values at the same time (in phase).

questions.text: The RMS value of AC current is ________ times the peak value.
questions.explanation: Irms = I0/√2 ≈ 0.707 I0, where I0 is the peak current.

questions.text: What is resonance in LCR circuit?
questions.correctAnswer: Resonance occurs when inductive reactance equals capacitive reactance (XL = XC), resulting in minimum impedance and maximum current.
questions.explanation: At resonance, ω = 1/√(LC) and the circuit behaves as a pure resistor.
